description: Evaluation dataset for the eNOVATION CBRN Training Centre ontology. 40 questions across three complexity tiers and multiple query shapes.

questions.nl_question: List all training centres.
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?label . }

gold_answers.label: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: What is the email address of CAMPUS VESTA?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?email WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?label ; enov:hasEmail ?email . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?label)), "campus")) }

questions.nl_question: What year was UCLouvain-CTMA established?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?label ; enov:hasYearOfEstablishment ?year . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?label)), "uclouvain")) }

questions.nl_question: What are all the available CBRN disciplines?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?disc rdf:type enov:TCDiscipline ; rdfs:label ?label . }

questions.nl_question: What training courses does UCLouvain-CTMA provide?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:providesTrainingCourse ?course . ?course rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "uclouvain")) }

gold_answers.label: Medical CBT training to doctors/ nurses

Biological threats: sampling,  detection, and identification.
Bio and toxin decontamination 
(the exact title can be different for each lecture)

questions.nl_question: Which training centres specialize in the B discipline?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?label ; enov:hasTCDiscipline ?disc . ?disc rdfs:label ?dLabel . FILTER(STR(?dLabel) = "B") }

gold_answers.label: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: What is the TRL of 'Real-time PCR (qPCR)'?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?tech rdf:type enov:Technology ; rdfs:label ?tLabel . ?tech enov:hasTRL ?trl . ?trl rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(STR(?tLabel) = "Real-time PCR (qPCR)") }

questions.nl_question: What facilities does JCBRN Defence CoE have?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:hasFacility ?fac . ?fac rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "jcbrn")) }

gold_answers.label: Classroom and Lecture halls of JCBRNDCoE
Field exercise areas of   of JCBRNDCoE
Live agents training ranges  of JCBRNDCoE
PPE storage and logistics support areas  of JCBRNDCoE

questions.nl_question: What training methods does CAMPUS VESTA offer?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:offersTrainingMethod ?method . ?method rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "campus")) }

questions.nl_question: Who is the target audience for the course 'CBRN Trainer Course'?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?course rdf:type enov:TrainingCourse ; rdfs:label ?cLabel . ?course enov:hasTrainingAudience ?aud . ?aud rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(STR(?cLabel) = "CBRN Trainer Course") }

questions.nl_question: Which CBRN networks is UCLouvain-CTMA connected to?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:connectsWithNetwork ?net . ?net rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "uclouvain")) }

gold_answers.label: CBRN DG HERA European Commision project
EU member states Civil Protection agencies
eNOTICE EU Network of CBRN Training Centers
eNOTICE-2 EU Network of CBRN Training Centers

questions.nl_question: What SOPs does UCLouvain-CTMA follow?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?label WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:usesSOP ?sop . ?sop rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "uclouvain")) }

gold_answers.label: SOPs for Deployment (Transportation,site selection and requirement, lab setup, waste management)

questions.nl_question: Which training centres engage with civil protection agencies as stakeholders?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:engagesWithStakeholders ?sh . ?sh rdfs:label ?shLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?shLabel)), "civil protection")) }

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: Which training centres are connected to the eNOVATION network?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:connectsWithNetwork ?net . ?net rdfs:label ?netLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?netLabel)), "enovation")) }

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: What is the total number of training courses?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?course) AS ?totalCourses) WHERE { ?course rdf:type enov:TrainingCourse . }

questions.nl_question: How many training courses does each training centre provide?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?tcLabel (COUNT(?course) AS ?courseCount) WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:providesTrainingCourse ?course . } GROUP BY ?tcLabel ORDER BY DESC(?courseCount)

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: Which training centres provide courses targeted at first responders?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:providesTrainingCourse ?course . ?course enov:hasTrainingAudience ?aud . ?aud rdfs:label ?audLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?audLabel)), "first responders")) }

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: What technologies does UCLouvain-CTMA use and what is their TRL?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?techLabel ?trlLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:usesTechnology ?tech . ?tech rdfs:label ?techLabel . ?tech enov:hasTRL ?trl . ?trl rdfs:label ?trlLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "uclouvain")) }

gold_answers.techLabel: Functional assays (e.g. cell-based assays, enzymatic activity tests)
Nucleic Acid-based Assays (e.g., PCR for genes encoding toxin components),
Rapid Diagnostic Tests (RDT) based on pathogen-specific antibodies - Immunoassays
High throughput Sequencing On-site (e.g. Oxford Nanopore Technology MinION)

Gaseous disinfectants/vapours 
(e.g., hydrogen peroxide vapour (HPV), ozone, chlorine dioxide)
Liquid disinfectants (e.g. sodium hypochlorite (bleach), peracetic acid)
Solid disinfectants (granular or tablet form, e.g., calcium hypochlorite)

questions.nl_question: Which training centres offer both classroom-based learning and e-learning?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:offersTrainingMethod ?m1 . ?tc enov:offersTrainingMethod ?m2 . ?m1 rdfs:label ?l1 . ?m2 rdfs:label ?l2 . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?l1)), "classroom")) FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?l2)), "e-learning") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?l2)), "elearning")) }

questions.nl_question: What exercises does CAMPUS VESTA organize and what type are they?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?exLabel ?typeLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:organizesExercise ?ex . ?ex rdfs:label ?exLabel . ?ex enov:hasExerciseType ?etype . ?etype rdfs:label ?typeLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "campus")) }

questions.nl_question: Which training centres have both live agent training ranges and simulation rooms?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:hasFacility ?f1 . ?tc enov:hasFacility ?f2 . ?f1 rdf:type enov:LiveAgentTrainingRanges . ?f2 rdf:type enov:SimulationRooms . }

questions.nl_question: What services does each training centre offer?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel ?serviceLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:offersService ?svc . ?svc rdfs:label ?serviceLabel . } ORDER BY ?tcLabel

questions.nl_question: Which courses have more than 20 total course hours?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?courseLabel ?hours WHERE { ?course rdf:type enov:TrainingCourse ; rdfs:label ?courseLabel . ?course enov:hasTotalCourseHours ?hours . FILTER(?hours > 20) } ORDER BY DESC(?hours)

questions.nl_question: What incidents does UCLouvain-CTMA tackle?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?incLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:tacklesIncident ?inc . ?inc rdfs:label ?incLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "uclouvain")) }

questions.nl_question: How many technologies does each training centre use?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?tcLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?tech) AS ?techCount) WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:usesTechnology ?tech . } GROUP BY ?tcLabel ORDER BY DESC(?techCount)

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: For each training centre, what are its disciplines and type?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel ?discLabel ?typeLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:hasTCDiscipline ?disc . ?disc rdfs:label ?discLabel . ?tc enov:hasTCType ?tctype . ?tctype rdfs:label ?typeLabel . } ORDER BY ?tcLabel

questions.nl_question: Which training centres use decontamination technologies?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel ?techLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:usesTechnology ?tech . ?tech rdf:type enov:DecontaminationTechnology . ?tech rdfs:label ?techLabel . }

gold_answers.techLabel:
Gaseous disinfectants/vapours 
(e.g., hydrogen peroxide vapour (HPV), ozone, chlorine dioxide)
Liquid disinfectants (e.g. sodium hypochlorite (bleach), peracetic acid)
Solid disinfectants (granular or tablet form, e.g., calcium hypochlorite)

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli
UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

gold_answers.techLabel: Limited decontamination capability (only for safely undressing police personnel).

questions.nl_question: Which training centres provide innovative technologies training?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:providesTrainingCourse ?course . ?course rdf:type enov:InnovativeTechnologiesTraining . }

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: How many networks is each training centre connected to?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?tcLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?net) AS ?networkCount) WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:connectsWithNetwork ?net . } GROUP BY ?tcLabel ORDER BY DESC(?networkCount)

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: What evaluation methods are used by exercises organized by CAMPUS VESTA?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?methodLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:organizesExercise ?ex . ?ex enov:usesEvaluationMethod ?method . ?method rdfs:label ?methodLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?tcLabel)), "campus")) }

questions.nl_question: Which training centre has the most training courses?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?tcLabel (COUNT(?course) AS ?courseCount) WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:providesTrainingCourse ?course . } GROUP BY ?tcLabel ORDER BY DESC(?courseCount) LIMIT 1

questions.nl_question: Which training centres specialize in all three CBRN disciplines (B, C, and RN)?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:hasTCDiscipline ?d1 . ?tc enov:hasTCDiscipline ?d2 . ?tc enov:hasTCDiscipline ?d3 . ?d1 rdfs:label "B" . ?d2 rdfs:label "C" . ?d3 rdfs:label "RN" . }

questions.nl_question: Which training centres provide courses for both military defence experts and first responders?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:providesTrainingCourse ?c1 . ?c1 enov:hasTrainingAudience ?a1 . ?a1 rdfs:label ?a1Label . ?tc enov:providesTrainingCourse ?c2 . ?c2 enov:hasTrainingAudience ?a2 . ?a2 rdfs:label ?a2Label . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?a1Label)), "military")) FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?a2Label)), "first responders")) }

questions.nl_question: Which training centre was established earliest?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?tcLabel ?year WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:hasYearOfEstablishment ?year . } ORDER BY ?year LIMIT 1

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: Which training centres have more than 5 facilities?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?tcLabel (COUNT(?fac) AS ?facCount) WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:hasFacility ?fac . } GROUP BY ?tcLabel HAVING (COUNT(?fac) > 5)

questions.nl_question: Which training centres both organize field exercises and use biological SOPs?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:organizesExercise ?ex . ?ex rdf:type enov:FieldExercise . ?tc enov:usesSOP ?sop . ?sop rdfs:label ?sopLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?sopLabel)), "biological")) }

questions.nl_question: For each audience type, how many courses are targeted at them?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?audLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?course) AS ?courseCount) WHERE { ?course rdf:type enov:TrainingCourse . ?course enov:hasTrainingAudience ?aud . ?aud rdfs:label ?audLabel . } GROUP BY ?audLabel ORDER BY DESC(?courseCount)

questions.nl_question: Which training centres use technologies with TRL 9?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:usesTechnology ?tech . ?tech enov:hasTRL ?trl . ?trl rdfs:label ?trlLabel . FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?trlLabel), "9")) }

gold_answers.tcLabel: UCSC Catholic University of the Sacred Heart for the Fondazione Policlinico Gemelli

questions.nl_question: What is the average number of course hours across all training courses?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (AVG(?hours) AS ?avgHours) WHERE { ?course rdf:type enov:TrainingCourse . ?course enov:hasTotalCourseHours ?hours . }

questions.nl_question: Which training centres have both military and civilian type designations?
questions.gold_sparql:
PREFIX enov: <http://www.semanticweb.org/eNOVATION-ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?tcLabel WHERE { ?tc rdf:type enov:TrainingCentre ; rdfs:label ?tcLabel . ?tc enov:hasTCType ?t1 . ?tc enov:hasTCType ?t2 . ?t1 rdfs:label ?l1 . ?t2 rdfs:label ?l2 . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?l1)), "military")) FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?l2)), "civilian")) }
